records.ety: [L. evocare; e out + vocare to call, fr. vox, vocis, voice: cf. F voquer. See Voice, and cf. Evocate.]
records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Evoked (?); p. pr. & vb. n. Evoking.]

defs: To call out; to summon forth.
quotes: To evoke the queen of the fairies.
A regulating discipline of exercise, that whilst evoking the human energies, will not suffer them to be wasted.

defs: To call away; to remove from one tribunal to another.
